nasb.text: and he told them to teach the sons of Judah the song of the bow; behold, it is written in the book of Jashar.

esv.text: and he said it should be taught to the people of Judah; behold, it is written in the Book of Jashar. He said:

cnv.text: 他又吩咐要把這首“弓歌”教導猶大人。

ccb.text: 并吩咐人教导犹大人唱这首弓歌。这首歌记在《雅煞珥书》上，歌词说：
